news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Dorchester Minerals, L.P. (NASDAQ-DMLP) disclosed its financial results for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The Partnership reported a net income of $17,642,000 for this period, equivalent to earnings of $0.36 per common unit.
news.headline: Dorchester Minerals, L.P. reports Q1 2025 net income of $17.6 million, $0.36 per common unit.

news.summary: A recent annual conference held in Florham Park, NJ brought together thousands of specialty pharmacy and industry professionals from April 27 to May 1. The Asembia's AXS25 Summit focused on the significant role of specialty pharmacies in improving patient access, prescription fulfillment, and affordability. The event served as a platform for industry leaders and stakeholders to discuss and collaborate on strategies to enhance healthcare services.
news.headline: Thousands attend Asembia's AXS25 Summit in Las Vegas to discuss specialty pharmacy's role in patient access, with attendees from April 27 – May 1.

news.summary: In Seattle, PitchBook, a leading data provider for private and public equity and credit markets, has unveiled its latest bi-annual overview of data coverage in global financial markets. The report showcases PitchBook’s comprehensive data coverage, emphasizing its position as the go-to source for private capital market players. With an expanded platform, PitchBook demonstrates unmatched data coverage, offering transparency and insights into its vast data collection. This update solidifies PitchBook as a crucial resource for all participants in the private capital markets.
news.headline: PitchBook enhances global data coverage for capital markets, reaffirming position as leading information source.
TRUMP ADMINISTRATION ASKS U.S. SUPREME COURT TO INTERVENE IN EFFORT TO REVOKE TEMPORARY LEGAL STATUS FOR CUBAN, HAITIAN, NICARAGUAN AND VENEZUELAN MIGRANTS.

news.summary: Nexstar Media Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: NXST) saw its shares rise as it reported a 3.9% year-over-year decrease in first-quarter FY25 net revenue to $1.234 billion, meeting expectations. The company owns various media brands, such as The CW and NewsNation, along with digital assets like The Hill and NewsNationNow.com. Advertising revenues dropped by 10.2% Y/Y to $460 million, mainly due to a $32 million decrease in political advertising and a $20 million decline in non-political ad revenue caused by weak advertising markets. Distribution revenue remained stable at $762 million.
news.headline: Nexstar Media Group reports Q1 revenue decline of 3.9% to $1.234 billion, but still raises dividend; stock price rises.
U.S. CUSTOMS BULLETIN: WILD-CAUGHT SHRIMP FROM PERU WITH DATE OF EXPORT JUNE 1, 2025, AND AFTER, AND PRODUCTS FROM THAT SHRIMP, WILL BE PROHIBITED FROM IMPORT INTO THE U.S.

news.summary: A proposed bill in Alberta, known as Bill 55, The Health Statutes Amendment Act, may permit private for-profit entities to operate and finance hospitals in the region. This legislation would empower the Health Minister to transfer hospital management to private entities, enabling them to levy fees for services rendered. CUPE Alberta President Raj Uppal, along with NDP MLAs and healthcare union leaders, gathered at the Alberta Legislature to urge the United Conservative Party (UCP) government to reconsider this move. This bill has sparked controversy and debate among various stakeholders within the healthcare sector.
news.headline: UCP introduces Bill 55 in Alberta allowing private, for-profit hospitals. CUPE Alberta and NDP oppose move.

news.summary: A prominent player in the InsurTech industry, Vertafore® acknowledged Dimond Bros. Insurance with the 2025 Power of Partnership Award for their dedication to innovation and teamwork. The award was presented in Denver on May 8, 2025. Dimond Bros. Insurance stood out among its peers for exemplifying the values of collaboration and forward-thinking in the insurance sector. This prestigious accolade underscores the agency's exceptional performance and commitment to leveraging technology to enhance their services.
news.headline: Vertafore honors Dimond Bros. Insurance for small commercial quoting with Power of Partnership Award.

news.summary: A company based in Sheridan, Wyoming, LoveStudy AI, made an announcement on May 8, 2025, about the debut of its latest product, the AI Podcast Generator. This tool is set to revolutionize the educational sector by converting study materials into engaging audio content. This innovative technology aims to offer a new way for individuals to learn.
news.headline: LoveStudy AI introduces AI Podcast Generator to make learning effortless, accessible, and memorable.

news.summary: Adster's innovative system and method for enhancing ad revenue and reducing ad latency has been acknowledged in the US Patent Application No. 18/926,743. This groundbreaking invention aims to optimize advertisement yield, ultimately boosting Programmatic Advertising revenue. The development comes from BENGALURU, India, and was made public on May 8, 2025.
news.headline: Adster Technologies receives US Patent for innovation in reducing ad serving latency, boosting programmatic revenue. US Patent Application No. 18/926,743 recognized their unique system.

news.summary: Endeavour Mining plc has disclosed that it received a notification on May 8, 2025, from La Mancha Resource Capital LLP regarding its stake in the company as of May 6, 2025.
news.headline: Endeavour Mining plc received notification from La Mancha Resource Capital LLP about its interests in the company as of 6 May 2025.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Oslo, Norway, the Annual General Meeting of TGS ASA took place. Shareholders unanimously approved all resolutions proposed during the meeting. For more information, the minutes from the Annual General Meeting can be accessed on the company's website at www.tgs.com.
news.headline: TGS ASA's 2025 Annual General Meeting in Oslo had all resolutions approved; minutes at tgs.com.

news.summary: Hedley Studios is set to open a temporary showroom at the IGY Vieux Port de Cannes Marina in Cannes from May 13 to May 24, operating from 10am to 7pm. The showroom will be located on the Jetée Albert Edouard Nord, providing a direct view of the Palais des Festivals. This launch will coincide with the renowned Cannes Film Festival, creating a unique opportunity to showcase their offerings.
news.headline: Hedley Studios to showcase automotive art at Cannes Film Festival with pop-up showroom at Vieux Port de Cannes Marina from May 13-24, 10am-7pm.

news.summary: On Thursday, a trade deal between the United States and the United Kingdom was revealed, signaling the beginning of efforts to reduce tariffs imposed during the Trump administration. This agreement is anticipated to be the initial step in a series of deals aimed at mitigating these tariffs. Noteworthy beneficiaries of this trade deal include tech giants Amazon, Google, and Meta. Despite the preservation of a 10% tariff, the S&P 500 experienced a surge following this announcement, as detailed in Investor's Business Daily's live coverage.
news.headline: U.S.-UK trade deal maintains 10% tariff. S&P 500 surges. Amazon, Google, Meta benefit. Trade deal may reduce Trump tariffs.
Trump ends remarks at the White House event.

news.summary: The latest report shows that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. This decrease means that around 300,000 new jobs were created in the last month alone, exceeding economists' expectations. Additionally, the stock market experienced a significant surge, with the major indexes rising by over 2% in response to this positive economic news. This boost in employment and market activity is seen as a sign of a strengthening economy as businesses continue to recover from the impact of the recent global pandemic.
news.headline: Trump advises immediate stock investment, criticizes Powell for delayed actions reports.

news.summary: In Santa Monica, California on May 8, 2025, Oliveda International, Inc. (OTC Pink: OLVI) reported that their subsidiary, Olive Tree People, has achieved a valuation exceeding $1 billion in a span of only two years. This makes them the most rapidly expanding waterless beauty company in the industry.
news.headline: Oliveda International, Inc. and its Olive Tree People subsidiary reach over $1 billion valuation in two years.

news.summary: Amsterdam, 8 May 2025 - AMG Critical Materials N.V. disclosed that in their Annual General Meeting today, all agenda items were approved by the shareholders. Dr. Heinz Schimmelbusch was also reappointed as the Chief Executive Officer for another two years beginning May 8, 2025. This decision was made during the meeting. AMG is listed on EURONEXT AMSTERDAM under the ticker symbol "AMG".
news.headline: AMG's 2025 AGM approved all agenda items, CEO reappointed for 2 years.

news.summary: An esteemed global awards program has honored exceptional digital health and medical technology products and companies. On May 8, 2025, in Seattle, YouScript®, a subsidiary of Aranscia, was revealed as the winner of the prestigious "PharmaTech Innovation Award." This recognition highlights the cutting-edge advancements made by YouScript® in the healthcare industry.
news.headline: YouScript wins "PharmaTech Innovation Award" in 9th Annual MedTech Breakthrough Awards Program, announced on May 8, 2025.
All proposals at the AGM 2025 approved by Philips shareholders.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, AMG Critical Materials N.V. disclosed that its shareholders greenlit a dividend payment of €0.40 per common share for the fiscal year 2024 during the Annual General Meeting. The €0.20 interim dividend disbursed on August 14, 2024 was subtracted from the total amount distributed to shareholders, resulting in a final dividend of €0.20 per ordinary share. The company's shares are listed on EURONEXT AMSTERDAM under the ticker symbol “AMG”.
news.headline: AMG's 2024 dividend finalized at €0.20 per ordinary share, approved by shareholders during AGM on May 8, 2025.
Details of share buyback transactions between April 24 and May 5, 2025, are disclosed without source.

news.summary: On May 6, 2025, Actelis Networks, Inc. revealed that it will release its financial outcomes and operational achievements for the first quarter of 2025 after the closure of the U.S. financial markets on Tuesday, May 13, 2025. Actelis, a prominent provider of cyber-hardened, quick deployment networking solutions for IoT and broadband uses, is traded on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ASNS. Their upcoming report will offer insights into the company's performance during this period.
news.headline: Actelis Networks (NASDAQ: ASNS) to announce Q1 2025 results on May 13, 2025, after U.S. market close.

news.summary: Approximately 30% of real estate agents noted a 1% to 10% rise in home value for staged homes, with nearly 50% of sellers seeing quicker home sales.
news.headline: NAR report shows home staging boosts prices by 1-10% with half of sellers experiencing faster sales.

news.summary: Recently, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 5%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This decrease is a positive sign for the economy, with over 300,000 new jobs added in the last month alone, mainly in the technology and healthcare sectors. Additionally, average hourly earnings have increased by 3.5% compared to last year. The strong job market has also led to a decrease in the number of people filing for unemployment benefits, with only 200,000 new claims reported this month. Experts attribute this turnaround to various factors including increased consumer spending and business investments. Overall, the job market is showing significant improvement and providing opportunities for many individuals in need of work.
news.headline: CNH's latest plan aims to boost product leadership and increase margins, propelling company growth.

news.summary: This announcement is being made in accordance with Article 53 of the Listing Rules (LR) of the SIX Exchange Regulation AG.
news.headline: Feintool announces CEO change, following Article 53 of the Listing Rules for SIX Exchange Regulation AG.

news.summary: A major digital platform connecting individuals and families to mental health and addiction treatment services is expanding further by appointing the former CEO of A Place For Mom. Recovery.com, headquartered in Madison, Wisconsin, announced this move on May 8, 2025. The platform aims to provide support and resources to individuals struggling with addiction and mental health issues on a global scale. This development signifies the company's commitment to growth and enhancing its services.
news.headline: Recovery.com adds former A Place For Mom CEO, Sean Kell, to Board of Directors, enhancing growth.

news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) is holding firm amidst market uncertainty as traders await the Federal Reserve's upcoming policy meeting. Cryptocurrency analyst Michaël van de Poppe of MN Consultancy predicts that Bitcoin may have hit its correction low, stating that the cryptocurrency is resilient despite recent market volatility. Van de Poppe believes the correction may bottom out today or tomorrow, attributing it to the upcoming FOMC meeting. Bitcoin was trading between $93,000 and $95,000 on Monday, reaching a high of $95,193.19. Van de Poppe's positive outlook is consistent with his prior forecasts, as he also pointed out a rally in gold.
news.headline: Bitcoin price stabilizes ahead of FOMC meeting, with analyst predicting bottom before meeting. BTC traded $93,000-$95,000, hitting high at $95,193. Analyst anticipates "up-only season."

news.summary: Today, Freddie Mac, headquartered in McLean, Virginia, revealed the findings of its latest Primary Mortgage Market Survey ® (PMMS ® ). The report indicates that the average rate for a 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) stands at 6.76%.
news.headline: Freddie Mac reports 30-year fixed-rate mortgage averages 6.76%, remaining flat.

news.summary: In Kansas City, Missouri on May 8, 2025, HCI Energy, a prominent company specializing in advanced power solutions for essential communication infrastructure, unveiled two reports demonstrating the significant environmental and economic benefits of its primary product, the Hybrid Power Shelter™. This innovative shelter has been found to reduce CO₂ emissions by a remarkable 90%, making a substantial impact on sustainability efforts.
news.headline: HCI Energy achieved 90% carbon emissions reduction and saved over $650,000 at telecom tower sites with their Hybrid Power Shelter™.

news.summary: AirBoss of America Corp. (TSX: BOS) (OTCQX: ABSSF) revealed that following the Annual General Meeting in Waterloo, Ontario, the nominees listed in the April 11, 2025 Notice of Meeting and Management Information Circular were successfully elected as directors. Precise figures detailing the vote outcomes for director elections and auditor appointments can be found below.
news.headline: AirBoss of America Corp. announced that all nominees from the AGM held in Waterloo, Ontario, were elected as directors.

news.summary: President Donald Trump's comprehensive budget proposal is facing challenges in Congress as Republican lawmakers strive to meet House Speaker Mike Johnson's Memorial Day deadline, trying to strike a balance between tax cuts and spending priorities that have caused division within the party. The ambitious budget package, referred to as the "one big, beautiful bill," includes tax breaks, spending cuts, and increased funding for border security. House committees have approved different sections mainly along party lines. Progress has been made on spending increases, with around $350 billion allocated for the Pentagon and Homeland Security, while work on tax cuts is still pending. Rep. Jason Smith (R-MO), Chairman of the Ways and Means Committee, acknowledged on Fox News Sunday that there have been some hurdles in the process. The proposed budget includes $46.5 billion for border wall construction.
news.headline: GOP aims to pass 'big, beautiful bill' with tax cuts, border wall funds & deep spending cuts by Memorial Day.议员为通过“大、美丽的法案”而努力，包括减税、边境墙基金和削减开支。 $350 billion for the Pentagon and Homeland Security approved, $46.5 billion for border wall.边境墙斥资465亿，五角大楼和国土安全部批准约3500亿。

news.summary: Land & Buildings Investment Management, LLC, a major stockholder of National Health Investors, Inc. (NYSE: NHI), has disclosed today that Glass, Lewis & Co., LLC, an independent proxy advisory firm, has advised stockholders to vote in favor of Land & Buildings' independent nominees Jim Hoffmann and Adam Troso for election to NHI's Board of Directors. This announcement comes from Stamford, Conn. Land & Buildings is asserting its proposal for changes at NHI through its nominees.
news.headline: Glass Lewis advises voting "FOR" Land & Buildings' nominees Jim Hoffmann & Adam Troso to NHI's Board.

news.summary: AdCellerant has launched a new resource offering practical tips for media companies to excel in tough economic times. On May 8, 2025, in Denver, the prominent digital marketing and advertising tech firm shared this news. The resource aims to assist media companies by providing crucial strategies.
news.headline: New white paper by AdCellerant offers strategies for media companies to thrive in tough economies. Released on May 8, 2025.

news.summary: The cryptocurrency Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) has surged by 45% in the last week, outperforming both Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) and Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) in terms of trading volume and price performance. Currently, Pepe is priced at $0.05, with a market cap of $3.9 billion. Over the past 24 hours, the price has increased by 14.4%, and over the last 7 days, it has risen by 5.95%. Meanwhile, Dogecoin is priced at $0.1840, with a market cap of $27.4 billion, experiencing a 24-hour increase of 6.6% and a 7-day increase of 3.3%. Shiba Inu is priced at $0.00001350, with a market cap of $7.95 billion, gaining 5.2% in the last 24 hours and 0.09% over the week. A crypto trader named CJ pointed out that Pepe is regaining ground in the short-term chart, correlating with Ethereum's surge. He advised caution for a potential deeper pullback and suggested targeting a demand zone for a more favorable entry point after missing an earlier support-resistance flip. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Pepe's crypto jumps 14%, outpaces Dogecoin and Shiba Inu. Pepe's trading volume surpasses Shiba Inu, with a 45% increase this week. Pepe's price performance has also edged ahead of both Shiba and Dogecoin. Pepe's market cap is $3.9 billion, with a 14.4% 24-hour trend and 5.95% 7-day trend. Dogecoin's market cap is $27.4 billion, with a 6.6% 24-hour trend and 3.3% 7-day trend. Shiba Inu's market cap is $7.95 billion, with a 5.2% 24-hour trend and 0.09% 7-day trend. Also, a crypto trader noted that Pepe is regaining its range, warning of a possible deeper pullback.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the national unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3% in July, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.9%. The data also indicated that the economy added 943,000 jobs last month, surpassing economists' expectations. The job gains were mainly seen in the leisure and hospitality, professional and business services, and healthcare sectors. Moreover, the average hourly earnings increased by 0.4% in July, reflecting a positive trend in wage growth. Overall, the latest statistics suggest a strong recovery in the labor market, following the challenges posed by the pandemic.
news.headline: Burgundy Diamond Mines unveils 2024 Socio-Economic Report, highlighting key figures.

news.summary: In a recent case in New Orleans, a jury decided to grant $3 million to the family of Jeanine Henderson, a 72-year-old New Orleans resident who tragically passed away due to mesothelioma. Mesothelioma, an uncommon and terminal cancer, was developed by Henderson through consistent exposure to asbestos found in Johnson & Johnson’s Baby Powder which she used regularly. After a lengthy trial lasting two months, the legal representatives from Dean Omar Branham Shirley successfully established the direct connection between Henderson's illness and her habitual application of the talc-infused product.
news.headline: Jury orders Johnson & Johnson to pay $3 million for mesothelioma death of New Orleans woman from Baby Powder use.

news.summary: Last week, mid-cap stocks saw impressive gains with Pony AI Inc (NASDAQ: PONY) shares soaring by 48.36% as the company signals nearing profitability and cost-efficient autonomous driving system development. Meanwhile, Hims & Hers Health, Inc. (NYSE: HIMS) stock surged by 45.32% following news of a partnership with Novo Nordisk A/S (NYSE: NVO) to provide a comprehensive package of all Wegovy dose strengths on its platform. Additionally, a B of A Securities analyst raised the price target... For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Top mid-cap gainers last week: Pony AI up 48.36%, Him & Hers Health up 45.32%. Other companies booming.

news.summary: There is a growing concern among Wall Street CEOs and Washington power brokers about whether the reputation of the United States is facing a continuous downward trend.
news.headline: Concerns rise over U.S. assets as Wall Street CEOs ponder if the America brand is in decline.
